## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress, SEO strategies, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 new articles generated \~2,200 impressions and 15 clicks in one week](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Swoogo reached a new high in daily impressions (10,000+)](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Team discussed integrating HubSpot data for lead tracking and implementing RB2B for better content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Swoogo team learned how to use SEMrush and Search Console for keyword tracking and performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [20 new articles published in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Generated \~2,200 impressions (avg. 300/day) and 15 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [New content already accounts for \~3% of total daily impressions](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Goal: Increase blog content's share of impressions to 20-30% and eventually drive the majority of impression base](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Team to use Notion doc as central database for summarized metrics](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Airtable used for content planning and tracking assignments](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Google Search Console recommended for most accurate organic traffic data](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [SEMrush utilized for keyword tracking and domain overview](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### SEO Strategy and Keyword Tracking

  - [Demonstrated how to use SEMrush for tracking keyword rankings and position changes](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Discussed setting up position tracking for specific keywords (e.g., "event management")](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Explained process of filtering and analyzing non-brand related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### Content Refresh and Testing

  - [5 articles submitted for re-indexing to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Using SEO Testing tool to monitor performance of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Expect to see bumps in impressions within a few days](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Aligning Content with Product Updates

  - [Discussed process for creating content around new features (e.g., mobile app relaunch)](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Will provide examples and calibration articles based on existing product pages](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Team to share rough drafts of upcoming mobile app update pages for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Technical SEO Considerations

  - [Current PageSpeed Insights scores are good (94% desktop, 92% mobile)](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Recommended improving mobile performance to match desktop scores](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [WordPress generally handles most technical SEO aspects well](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to provide Stacey access to Search Console for monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Mitchel to create a list of blog-driven leads for reporting purposes](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Team to consider implementing RB2B for better lead identification](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Will to share draft pages about upcoming mobile app updates for content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of newly published and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Swoogo team to work on improving mobile PageSpeed score](https://fathom.video/share/DNVePwfKMbQDG-F9JtgvGyvcMsQWBVs9?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
